session.user: Run these two commands sequentially and report results: 1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/view_cmd.py` 2. `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_view_cmd.py -v` Do NOT fix any errors - just report results.
session.assistant: I'll run these two commands sequentially and report the results. Let me start by normalizing them for the venv.

tool_use.param: Run view_cmd tests with verbose output
